reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del personal que atendió en el surtidor, muy amables le pregunte por alojamiento , y amablemente ellos me pasaron información, al otro día, pasamos a desayunar , nos tomamos unos café con leche espectacular, el encargado (no se su nombre) , muy buena onda , super amable, pasamos un momento hermoso, la mejor ACA del pais ¡¡¡¡ , conozco desde Ushuaia hasta la quiaca , saludos buena gente ¡¡¡¡¡

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff at the gas station, very friendly. I asked about accommodation, and they kindly gave me information. The next day, we went for breakfast and had some amazing coffees. The manager (I don't know his name) was very friendly and helpful. We had a wonderful time. The best ACA in the country! I know them from Ushuaia to La Quiaca. Greetings to all the great people!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJcV9PUHNBRRAB
